creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
portupgrading postfix to 2.6 kills master.cf when it is not modified. When it is modified it is not touched.

How-To-Repeat: [root@www ~]# ls /usr/local/etc/postfix/
LICENSE                 aliases                 generic                 main.cf.default         relocated
TLS_LICENSE             bounce.cf.default       header_checks           makedefs.out            transport
access                  canonical               main.cf                 master.cf               virtual
You have new mail in /var/mail/root
[root@www ~]# portupgrade -fPP postfix
** Custom MAKE_ARGS or -m option is specified (-DWITH_PCRE,-DWITH_SASL2,-DWITH_TLS)
** Trying package anyway, since -PP/--use-packages-only is specified
--->  Checking for the latest package of 'mail/postfix'
[...]
[root@www ~]# ls /usr/local/etc/postfix/
LICENSE                 aliases                 generic                 main.cf.default         transport
TLS_LICENSE             bounce.cf.default       header_checks           makedefs.out            virtual
access                  canonical               main.cf                 relocated
[root@www ~]# ls /usr/local/etc/postfix/master.cf
ls: /usr/local/etc/postfix/master.cf: No such file or directory
[root@www ~]#
